name: Hot Crab Dip
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cream cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, dry mustard, and garlic salt until smooth. Gradually add milk to achieve a creamy consistency. Stir in half of the grated cheddar cheese. Gently fold in the crab meat. Top with remaining grated cheddar cheese. Bake at 325 degrees F until the mixture is bubbly and lightly browned on top, about 30 minutes. Serve warm with crackers.
